title: D3K Legacy
body:
## **D3K Legacy**

The D3K Legacy Modpack offers a range of enhancements that significantly improve both the performance and gameplay experience in Minecraft. Designed with a variety of mods, it enhances the game with quality-of-life features, visual upgrades, and performance optimizations, providing a tailored experience for players seeking an immersive world.
## 
## **Features:**

- **Built-in calculator**
 
- **Search for texture packs in Minecraft**
 
- **Enhanced performance**
 
- **Optimization improvements**
  
- **Built-in freecam**
  
- **Map with minimap and waypoints**
  
- **Additional cool features**


One of the key aspects of the D3K Legacy Modpack is its ability to dramatically improve the game's performance. With mods like Sodium and FerriteCore, the game runs smoother, particularly on lower-end systems, while Entity Culling reduces unnecessary calculations to further boost performance. For players seeking smoother visuals, Iris Shaders and Complementary Shaders - Reimagined bring a stunning visual overhaul, making the Minecraft world look more dynamic and engaging.

Navigation is also made easier with the addition of Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's World Map, which provide intuitive mapping and waypoint systems to help you explore the world. MiniHUD also offers customizable overlays to display important information like coordinates, FPS, and other stats right on your screen.

The modpack also integrates several quality-of-life improvements. Freecam allows for more freedom when exploring the world, while Resourcify enhances resource management by making it easier to gather and utilize materials. CalcMod even adds a calculator for in-game computations, making certain tasks more efficient.

For a better user experience, Mod Menu and Options Profiles provide quick and easy management of installed mods and configuration settings, ensuring that your gameplay remains smooth and tailored to your preferences.

Importantly, the D3K Legacy Modpack is fully compatible with Lunar Client, extending its capabilities by adding performance enhancements, improved visual effects, and streamlined features to enhance your overall experience. Whether you're playing solo or with friends, this modpack ensures that your Minecraft world runs beautifully, with better performance and more immersive features than ever before.
